state_machine.meaning: Compliance has received an advisor-approved candidate but no release outcome exists.
Compliance requested more evidence and release remains blocked.
Compliance blocks release with an auditable reason.
Compliance release succeeded only after advisor, evidence, rationale, payload, redaction, permission and audit gates pass.

source_evidence.role: Phase 7 compliance queue, evidence request, rationale and release-precondition model.
Typed action side effects for request_evidence, compliance_block and compliance_release.
State-machine proof for compliance pending, evidence request, rationale and release blockers.
API-side proof for release, block and request evidence outcomes.

commands_run.command: pnpm playwright test tests/p44-phase7-certification.spec.ts tests/scf-p04-p06-flow-ui.spec.ts tests/release-spine-command-surface.spec.ts tests/recommendation-review-workflow-api.spec.ts tests/journey-api.spec.ts --workers=1

validation.positive_acceptance_result: Compliance release can complete only after the release precondition spine passes.
validation.negative_acceptance_result: Request evidence and block outcomes keep recommendation.clientVisible false and persist audit/block states.

bold_cleanup_recommendations: Make ReleaseSpine the only release-precondition evaluator for compliance release in all routes.
Remove any release-adjacent action that cannot report its precondition missing list before mutation.
Ban queue-level release mutation; only the decision room or command API may request release.
